purpose: Machine-readable acceptance contract derived from the original user request, written BEFORE implementation. Defines 'done' as a traceable proof checklist, not an agent's feeling.

criteria.criterion: Replace with one acceptance criterion phrased as a checkable statement.
criteria.source: Quote or paraphrase the exact part of the user request this comes from.
criteria.evidence: What artifact/log/output proves this is satisfied.
criteria.verificationCommand: Command or manual step that produces the evidence.

doneRule: The unit is 'done' only when every criterion is 'passed' with attached evidence. A criterion with no evidence or an un-run verification command stays 'pending' and blocks done (fail-closed).
